description.ko: 우주의 가장 먼 곳, 빛조차 심연의 무게에 짓눌려 사라지는 곳을 탐험합니다. VOID-3는 무한한 진공이 지닌 고요한 장엄함과 공포스러운 규모를 담아냅니다.
description.en: An exploration of the farthest reaches of the universe, where light is consumed by the crushing weight of the cosmic deep. VOID-3 captures the silent majesty and terrifying scale of the infinite vacuum.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a colossal, iridescent crystalline monolith floating in the center of a swirling dark nebula. Deep indigo and midnight blue color palette with bioluminescent light trails. Shards of ancient celestial matter drifting in the absolute vacuum. High-fidelity textures, ethereal atmosphere, 8k resolution, photorealistic cosmic horror aesthetics.
